use_cases: Upload audio files with drag-and-drop support in podcast or music applications
Display animated waveform visualization during audio upload processes
Provide visual feedback for drag-over states in audio sharing platforms
Enable audio file attachments in messaging or collaboration tools
Support custom title and description for branded audio upload experiences
ai_summary: An animated audio upload card component with drag-and-drop functionality and dynamic waveform visualization. Features Framer Motion animations, customizable title and description, and supports both drag-over and click-to-upload interactions. The component includes a base card wrapper that handles upload state styling and is designed for media, creator tools, and SaaS applications requiring audio file uploads.
